title: thymus chamaedrys var. rochelianus
intro: Thymus chamaedrys var. rochelianus, also known as white thyme or white creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen herbaceous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thymus chamaedrys var. rochelianus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils for topical use, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and skin infections.
